subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up from Vendor Inc. It was great connecting at the conference last month, and I'm interested in exploring potential collaboration opportunities.

A 30-minute call next week sounds good. Could you share your availability? Please let me know which days and time slots work best for you, and I'll work to find a mutually convenient time.

Regarding your request for direct contact details: I'll need to consult with our CTO and VP of Engineering about their availability and preferred communication channels before sharing their personal contact information. I'm happy to coordinate the initial discussions and ensure the right technical stakeholders are involved at the appropriate time.

Please send over your availability, and we'll get something scheduled.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
